$schema_comment: Reference: scalekit-inc/developer-docs src/configs/sidebar.config.ts — first sidebar entry (id: authenticate). Labels and order reflect the intended developer journey.

journey_groups.journey_phase: Onboard and orient — account setup, fastest path to value, examples
Core login lifecycle — implement, complete, session, logout, related dashboard topics
journey_groups.notes: Heavy pages grouped under one phase so readers follow the auth loop in order.

journey_groups.journey_phase: Configure how users sign in after basics work
Directory, provisioning, org modeling, hosted UI — after auth paths exist
Roles, permissions, access control — after identity exists
Branding, domains, email, attributes, external deep links where applicable
Discovery — single link row to integration catalog

label_conventions.section_headers: Name the phase of the journey (what the reader is doing next), not a generic bucket
label_conventions.ordering_principle: Roughly: setup → first success → deepen product area → adjacent concerns (APIs, customization) → ship
